docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-03-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JOAQUIN VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NESTOR ESQUIVEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TO RETURN VEHICLE TO PLAINTIFF BY 3/21/18 AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT FOR SERVICES RENDERED. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL PROGRESS REPORT HEARING, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETLLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY VALLE, JOAQUIN ESQUIVEL, NESTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLE, JOAQUIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, NESTOR $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,135.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT RETURN PLAINTIFF'S CAR AFTER REPEATED ATTEMPTS TO CLAIM IT. DEFENDANT WOULD NOT RETURN THE FULLY REPAIRED CAR ON THE DAY OF HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED THE APPROXIMATE VALUE OF THE CAR. DEFENDANT MAY KEEP THE CAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED NOV-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, NESTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-07-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JOAQUIN VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NESTOR ESQUIVEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY VALLE, JOAQUIN ESQUIVEL, NESTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF JOAQUIN VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NESTOR ESQUIVEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VALLE, JOAQUIN AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, NESTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO JAN-16-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES AGREE THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL RETURN PLAINTIFF'S CAR BY JANUARY 15, 2018. DEFENDANT WAIVES THE FIVE DAY FILING OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE REQUIRMENT. PLAINTIFF JOAQUIN VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NESTOR ESQUIVEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-05-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOAQUIN VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NESTOR ESQUIVEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
